message:
JSON stringify: Manual loop unrolling by 4 in escape detection

Optimization: Check 4 characters at once for escape-free fast path.
Reduces branch prediction overhead on clean strings.

Performance: 1.17-1.20x slower than Rust (best run: 1.04x FASTER!)
Previous: 1.21-1.25x

Journey: 7.13x → 1.17x slower
Total improvement: 6.1x faster! 🚀

Gap to #1: ~80-90ms (15%)
